title: Mouthwatering Brazilian Lamb Skewers
description: Indulge in the bold flavors of Brazil with these succulent lamb skewers, marinated in a mixture of spices and herbs, then grilled to perfection. This dish is perfect for a special occasion or a night out with friends.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, garlic, ginger, cumin, coriander, paprika, salt, and black pepper to make the marinade.
Add the lamb cubes to the marinade and toss to coat, then cover and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Preheat a grill to medium-high heat and thread the marinated lamb cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes per side, or until the lamb is cooked to an internal temperature of 145 degrees.
Transfer the skewers to a plate and brush with lemon juice.
Let the skewers rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with fresh parsley or cilantro if desired.
To add a Buddhist-temple-friendly touch, serve the skewers with a side of steamed vegetables or a simple green salad.
